include: cultural events promoted by Porto municipality or relevant local entities
talks or guided visits only when culturally strong and not framed as theatre/cinema/cycles
curation: tight, but include one broader cultural section so the radar does not become only nightlife/music
sourcePriorities: Agenda Porto / Câmara Municipal do Porto
Museu da Cidade / Cultura em Expansão when profile-fit

formatting.structure: Group recommendations by event type section, then list events inside each section.
formatting.indentation: Use clean indentation with short bullet subitems for date, place, why it fits, and source/link.
formatting.emojis: Use a few practical emojis in section titles and key fields to improve readability without overdoing it.
formatting.culturalSectionRule: Include a 🏛️ Cultura / Arte / Cidade section with 2-4 strong picks from municipal and cultural-entity sources, as long as they are not excluded categories.
